title: InLife – Society Initiative

fields.label: Hero kicker
fields.name: society_initiative_kicker
fields.instructions: Short label above the initiative title.

fields.label: Hero lead
fields.name: society_initiative_lead
fields.instructions: Short lead under the page title.

fields.label: Hero media type
fields.name: society_initiative_hero_media_type
fields.instructions: Choose visual type for the initiative hero.

fields.label: Hero image
fields.name: society_initiative_hero_image
fields.instructions: Optional custom hero image; falls back to featured image if left empty.

fields.label: Hero note
fields.name: society_initiative_hero_note
fields.instructions: Optional short note near the hero media.

fields.label: Local navigation
fields.name: society_initiative_local_nav_mode
fields.instructions: Choose how the page-level navigation works.

fields.label: Manual local navigation items
fields.name: society_initiative_manual_nav
fields.instructions: Used only when local navigation is set to manual.

fields.label: Related posts block
fields.name: society_initiative_show_related_news
fields.instructions: Optional bottom block for related posts/news.

fields.label: Related posts mode
fields.name: society_initiative_related_posts_mode
fields.instructions: Manual selection is safest; taxonomy/tag mode is convenient for recurring initiatives.

fields.label: Manual related posts
fields.name: society_initiative_related_posts_manual
fields.instructions: Pick posts related to this initiative.

fields.label: Tag slug
fields.name: society_initiative_related_posts_tag_slug
fields.instructions: Enter post tag slug for automatic query.

fields.label: Category slug
fields.name: society_initiative_related_posts_category_slug
fields.instructions: Enter post category slug for automatic query.

fields.label: Page sections
fields.name: society_initiative_sections
fields.instructions: Build initiative pages from reusable blocks. Add anchor IDs only when you want section links in local navigation.

description: Fields for flexible Society initiative pages.
